response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong full-stack engineer with broad experience across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web systems, but he does not meet the mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project — far short of the 5–10 years required. He has no demonstrated experience in fixed income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets systems, and no evidence of Windows-platform development or SQL Server/Oracle proficiency. The skill set mismatch is too fundamental to bridge.
strengths: Java development background satisfies one of the optional/desirable criteria
Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps experience across multiple roles (GitLab, Docker, deployment pipelines)
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing track record evidenced by conference talks and multi-day workshops
concerns: C++ experience is limited to ~6 months (National Instruments, 2014–2015) versus the mandatory 5–10 years
Zero domain exposure to fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking systems
No evidence of Windows-platform development or SQL Server/Oracle proficiency; stack is predominantly Linux/web

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Broad software engineering and DevOps background
